SupportChat.title: SupportChat
SupportChat.description: Represents a single support chat session with a carrier or dispatcher client.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: A single text message inside a chat thread session.

/chats/{chatId}.description: Root collection storing metadata for active user chat rooms.

/chats/{chatId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Sub-collection of messages ordered by timestamp for a thread.
